zh.lifeSummary: Henry Thomas Wharton於1475年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德華頓。他於1499年與Ann Elizabeth Warcop在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯圖頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根凱爾費利 卡素享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wharton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Wharton, in Westmorland, Cheshire, and Lincolnshire, or from Warton in Lancashire, Northumberland, and Warwickshire. The Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Northumberland placenames probably derive from Old English weard ‘watch’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Cheshire and Warwickshire placenames derive from Old English wæfre ‘swamp, marshy ground’ + tūn. The Westmorland placename may derive from Old English hwearf ‘embankment, shore, wharf’ + tūn.
perhaps occasionally a habitational name from Wiverton in Nottinghamshire, derived from the Old English personal name Wīgfrith + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warton
meanings: English (North western England and West Midlands): variant of   Wharton  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Thomas Wharton was born in 1475, in Wharton, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. He married Ann Elizabeth Warcop in 1499, in Stourton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1520, in Caerphilly Castle, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Thomas Whartonは1475年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドウアルトンで生まれた。1499年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストウルトンでAnn Elizabeth Warcopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンケエルフィリー カストルで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Thomas Wharton(은)는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 화아르턴에서 태어났다. 그는 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스토우르턴에서 Ann Elizabeth Warcop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 카이르필리 카스틀에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.
